description_long: This sconce features a sleek, vertical rod supporting two cylindrical light housings, one positioned above the other. The housings are finished in a dark, likely metallic material, with the front faces revealing translucent or frosted glass covers for diffusing light. Below the lights, two smaller cylindrical elements are attached to the rod, possibly serving as decorative or structural features. The overall design is minimalist and modern, with clean lines and a balanced, symmetrical arrangement. The fixture appears to be intended for wall mounting, with the lights projecting outward to illuminate the surrounding area. The materials and construction suggest durability and suitability for both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, vertical wall sconce with two cylindrical light housings and a minimalist, dark metal finish. Features clean lines and frosted glass covers for diffused illumination.
description_view_0: Front view showing both cylindrical light housings with frosted glass faces and the symmetrical arrangement of the fixture.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cylindrical housings and the slim profile of the vertical rod.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the housings and the rod, with less detail visible on the glass covers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the profile of the housings and the rod, mirroring view 1.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a minimalist, modern design with clean lines and a focus on geometric simplicity. The use of dark metal and frosted glass gives it a contemporary, urban aesthetic.
